profile.channel_mismatch_note: HQ and technology decision-making in Houston — fully within WWT STOLA territory. No channel conflict.

signals.signal_title: Internal data analytics for drilling and completions optimization — proprietary tooling
signals.signal_description: EOG Resources develops proprietary internal technology tools for drilling and completions optimization, consistent with its operationally lean, self-reliant culture. Data analytics underpin well performance and capital efficiency decisions. Limited external vendor footprint compared to peers.

signals.signal_title: AI and cybersecurity risk acknowledged in 2024 10-K risk factors
signals.signal_description: EOG Resources' 2024 10-K explicitly identifies AI adoption and cybersecurity as material risk factors, signaling awareness of the need to manage and invest in these areas even within its conservative IT culture.
